summary: Keep vault sync fast with large blobs tree
description: Mega Vault Viewer became slow while syncing; diagnose and prevent full binary/CAS blob traversal or hashing during normal sync.
acceptance: Sync skips non-indexable binary/CAS payload traversal where safe; vault size remains available from indexed metadata; regression proves large blobs tree does not inflate sync workload

evidence.summary: Root cause: discover_vault_files read+hashed every file, including CAS blobs and Obsidian/runtime dirs, making sync scale with blob payload size. Fixed discovery to prune blobs/.obsidian/runtime/cache dirs and hash non-Markdown via metadata fingerprint while Markdown content remains content-hashed. Added sync_skips_cas_blob_payload_tree regression. Verified focused cargo test, cargo test --workspace, npm run check, go validate. Real broad vault topology probe timed out after 120s, confirming full traversal is too expensive.
